summary: ANDROID | FALCON | DFU - After succesful DFU previous FW version is displayed on Home page and settings page
scenario: Home screen and Device Settings page show previous firmware version after DFU until app restart
description_clean: After a successful DFU (Device Firmware Update), the Home screen and device settings page still display the previous firmware version instead of the updated version. The correct firmware version only appears after restarting the app.
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Navigate to Home screen and note the firmware version displayed for the connected device.
Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] and note the firmware version shown there.
Perform a Device Firmware Update (DFU) successfully.
After the DFU completes, return to the Home screen and check the firmware version.
Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] and check the firmware version again.
Force close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Reopen the app and check the firmware version on the Home screen and in Device Settings → [Device Name].
expected: After a successful DFU, the updated firmware version should immediately appear on the Home screen and in Device Settings → [Device Name] without requiring an app restart.
actual: After a successful DFU, the Home screen and Device Settings → [Device Name] still display the previous firmware version. The correct (updated) firmware version only appears after restarting the app.
